nasb.text: My people are destroyed for lack of knowledge. Because you have rejected knowledge, I also will reject you from being My priest. Since you have forgotten the law of your God, I also will forget your children.

esv.text: My people are destroyed for lack of knowledge; because you have rejected knowledge, I reject you from being a priest to me. And since you have forgotten the law of your God, I also will forget your children.

cnv.text: 我的子民因無知識而滅亡； 因為你拒絕了知識， 我必拒絕你，不讓你作我的祭司； 因為你忘掉了你　神的律法， 我也必忘記你的子孫。

ccb.text: 我的子民因不认识我而遭毁灭。 因为你们拒绝认识我， 我也要拒绝让你们做我的祭司； 因为你们忘记我的律法， 我也要忘记你们的儿女。
